Guitar effect patches for the Valeton GP-200

This is a file library, use Valeton software to handle the patches.

 
View Patches Upload Patch Request Patch View Video Links Add Video Link

Woke Up With Wood - ZZ Top

I created just one patch for the Valeton GP-200 that I use to play the song by ZZ Top called "Woke Up With Wood" from their Afterburner album that came out in 1985. When playing the intro riff, solo or outro solo, I have the delay and boost engaged. I have CTRL 4 configured to disable/enable the delay and boost, which you can move to wherever appropriate. It is such a fun song to play, I high recommend learning it.

cdbento

2026-01-03
